description: Guido from Block-Builders introduces the Binance Futures platform, explaining the differences between trading on Binance and Bitmex. He discusses the necessity of having a Binance account and Tether to trade Bitcoin futures, highlighting the trading volume on Bitmex and the advantages of using Binance Futures.
topic_summary: Overview of Binance Futures platform and comparison with Bitmex, including trading mechanics and asset requirements [t=0:00 - t=3:30].
